title: Ubiquiti PrismAP-5-90, (Horn-5-90) Asymetrical sector 5GHz antenna, 13dBi, 90°
description: The isolation antennas are interchangeable and feature high-performance beam patterns for a range of demanding deployment needs. Combined with the PrismStation 5AC or IsoStation radio, the system gets maximum gain out of the smallest footprint 90° version has naturally attenuated side lobes and extremely low back radiation. Antenna offer the best front-to-back ratio in the industry and the lowest side lobe radiation. Asymmetrical horn antennas are ideal for cluster sector installations with high co-location requirements
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH, Slant (+- 45 °) VSWR < 2,0 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 17 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 90 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 45 Antenna type Sector Antenna gain [dBi] 13 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors IsoStation port Physical characteristics Wind load [km/h] 200 Purpose Outdoor Weight [kg] 0,9 Width [mm] 152 Height [mm] 187 Depth [mm] 113
